title: Calculate unconstrained linear thermal expansion
instructions: Read the component data and calculation requirements. Calculate the temperature change and unconstrained linear thermal expansion, independently verify the expansion using a second unit-consistent route, identify the expansion direction, state the required disposition, and write only the required JSON deliverable.

input_assets.purpose: Defines component length, temperatures, and linear expansion coefficient.
Defines the calculation, verification, reporting, and human-review requirements.

deliverable.description: A structured unconstrained thermal-expansion calculation and verification record.

constraints: Calculate temperature change as operating temperature minus installation temperature.
Independently verify using the installed length converted to millimetres before applying the equation.
Report relative difference as a percentage.
Use requires_expansion_accommodation_review when positive expansion exists.
Do not approve support, flexibility, stress, restraint, or final engineering design.
